final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original UI design system showcase illustration featuring a web Dashboard, mobile interface, cards, buttons, and controls.

Style/medium: needs a classic minimalist tech aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include multiple UI components arranged in a layered, hierarchical layout — Dashboard panel, mobile screen, cards, buttons, and controls all visible together
Subject: must include:
  - Web Dashboard interface panel
  - Mobile app interface screen
  - UI cards (multiple)
  - Buttons (various states)
  - Controls / widgets (toggles, sliders, inputs, etc.)
Scene/backdrop: needs a deep tech-environment backdrop — exact background treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a visually striking, high-tech atmosphere with strong depth and visual hierarchy — exact light source and glow treatment are yours
Color palette: needs a cool-toned tech direction — exact hues, accent colors, and contrast ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sleek, glass-morphism or dark-panel surface treatment — exact sheen and layering depth are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve all five UI component categories (Dashboard / mobile interface / cards / buttons / controls) as clearly distinguishable elements
Avoid: flat, dull, or low-contrast layouts; overly colorful non-tech palettes
